ComfyPencilStudio.description: Open a layered drawing studio, paint directly in ComfyUI, and output the current composite as IMAGE and MASK.

document_name.name: Document Name
document_name.tooltip: Visible title for the saved painting document.

document_id.name: Document Id
document_id.tooltip: Internal saved document reference managed by the studio.

revision.name: Revision
revision.tooltip: Internal revision value used to invalidate cached execution when the painting changes.

canvas_width.name: Canvas Width
canvas_width.tooltip: Pixel width of the painting surface.

canvas_height.name: Canvas Height
canvas_height.tooltip: Pixel height of the painting surface.

background_mode.name: Background Mode
background_mode.tooltip: Choose whether the document stores a transparent background or a solid paper tone.

background_color.name: Background Color
background_color.tooltip: Paper color used when the background mode is solid.

flatten_background.name: Flatten Background
flatten_background.tooltip: Bake the paper or background image into the IMAGE output.

0.name: Document
0.tooltip: Workflow document payload for downstream ComfyPencil nodes.

1.name: Image
1.tooltip: Current composite image from the studio.

2.name: Mask
2.tooltip: Alpha mask of the painted content.

3.name: Metadata JSON
3.tooltip: Summary JSON for the current document state.

ComfyPencilImportLayer.description: Push an upstream IMAGE or MASK into a ComfyPencil document as a new layer.

1.name: Image
1.tooltip: Rendered document image after the import.

2.name: Mask
2.tooltip: Rendered document alpha after the import.

ComfyPencilRenderDocument.description: Render a PENCIL_DOCUMENT into IMAGE and MASK outputs.

ComfyPencilExtractLayer.description: Extract a single layer from a PENCIL_DOCUMENT by name or index.
